Commands:
/start - Start the bot

If you have any questions, contact support.
pay-crypto-info:
Payment via CryptoBot

You will receive: { $total } look coins
Including bonus: { $bonus } percent
Amount: { $price } USD

Instructions:
1. Click Pay button below
2. Select payment method in CryptoBot
3. Complete the payment
4. Click Check payment to confirm
pay-stars-info:
Payment via Telegram Stars

You will receive: { $total } look coins
Including bonus: { $bonus } percent
Amount: { $stars } Stars

Instructions:
1. Click Pay with Stars
2. Confirm payment in Telegram
3. Coins will be credited automatically

• Face fully visible
• Look straight at the camera
